entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop species being studied for the development of climate-resilient varieties

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE-BASED BREEDING
entities.description: An innovative breeding concept that exploits superior alleles or haplotypes to create new traits in designer crop varieties

entities.name: WHOLE-GENOME RE-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A genomic technique used to analyze 399 genotypes from the 3K-RG panel to identify superior haplotypes

entities.name: 3000 RICE GENOMES PANEL
entities.description: A genomic resource (3K-RG) containing 3000 rice genomes used for mining candidate genes

entities.name: DROUGHT-RESPONSIVE CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Genes identified as responding to drought stress, with 95 candidates initially mined

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENE-BASED ASSOCIATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analytical approach used to reveal marker-trait associations (MTAs) for single plant yield

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: The statistical link between genetic markers and specific phenotypic traits

entities.name: SINGLE PLANT YIELD
entities.description: A productivity measure (SPY) used to evaluate the performance of rice genotypes under drought stress

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The environmental stress condition used to evaluate crop resilience and yield

entities.name: HAPLO-PHENO ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to identify superior haplotypes associated with higher single plant yield

entities.name: OSGSK1-H4
entities.description: A superior haplotype associated with significantly higher single plant yield under drought stress

entities.name: OSDSR2-H3
entities.description: A superior haplotype associated with significantly higher single plant yield under drought stress

entities.name: OSDIL1-H22
entities.description: A superior haplotype associated with significantly higher single plant yield under drought stress

entities.name: OSDREB1C-H3
entities.description: A superior haplotype associated with significantly higher single plant yield under drought stress

entities.name: ASR3-H88
entities.description: A superior haplotype associated with significantly higher single plant yield under drought stress

entities.name: DSM3-H4
entities.description: A superior haplotype associated with significantly higher single plant yield under drought stress

entities.name: ZFP182-H4
entities.description: A superior haplotype associated with significantly higher single plant yield under drought stress

entities.name: OSDREB1C
entities.description: A DREB transcription factor whose superior haplotype is present in drought-tolerant rice varieties

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of rice varieties to maintain yield and survive under drought conditions

relationships.description: used to develop climate-resilient varieties of
